body_txt: What's a good way to express your affections for your lover? Buying a malted milkshake, getting two straws, and just sipping it together. This trope was really popular back in the '50s, when diners and drugstore lunch counters were all the rage. It's made a comeback in Asian metropolitan societies, which have an attachment for cutesy love displays. It's a sign of an over-the-top romantic relationship . Often accompanied by a Headbutt of Love . See also Indirect Kiss , Through His Stomach , and Spaghetti Kiss .
